description: List all attached persistent databases with file and WAL sizes
comment: Returns database_name, database_file_bytes, and wal_file_bytes for each non-system, non-temporary, non-in-memory attached database

description: List all tables with persisted data and index sizes
comment: Calculates data size by counting unique persistent block IDs per table, and index size from ART allocator buffers

description: Show per-segment storage details for a column
comment: Returns row_group_id, compression type, compressed_bytes, estimated_decompressed_bytes, and row_count for each segment
Breaks down a .duckdb file into table_data, index, metadata, and free_blocks with size_bytes, percentage, and block_count
